admin
tasks / capreader2 simple / cap-node

guard-node

chore Todo
write preview

BODY_MARKER: Guard against creating a memory store that collides with an existing one.

Comments · 1
reviewer 2026-07-16 06:31

COMMENT_MARKER: I'd reject on collision with a clear error naming the existing store's owner and creation time, then let the caller decide to adopt or pick a new key. Silent idempotence is convenient for retries but it means two unrelated callers can end up sharing state without ever finding out, which is worse than a loud failure. We should also make sure the error payload is structured, not just a generic message, so an agent reading it can act on it directly instead of re-parsing English text.
